name: figmake-sync
description: Local-first macOS sync agent for Figma Make projects using an authenticated local browser session.
author: figmake

scripts.package:dir: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dmg zip --universal
scripts.dist:mac:signed: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --universal
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win nsis --x64
scripts.dist:all: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dmg zip --universal --win nsis --x64
